ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the restaurant is located */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine offered */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "last_inspection_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code representing violations found during the inspection */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade assigned to the restaurant after inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, follow-up) */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score assigned to the restaurant based on the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_grade FOREIGN KEY ("grade") REFERENCES grades ("grade"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_violation_code FOREIGN KEY ("violation_code") REFERENCES violation_codes ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_codes" (
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the specific violation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the violation (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade assigned to a restaurant post-inspection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Range of scores that correspond to each grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection associated with the log */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and notes from the inspector regarding the inspection */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., reviewed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_logs_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_logs_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inspector, admin, public user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_training" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the training program was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up inspection */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initial inspection */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow-up inspection is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up inspection (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and notes regarding the follow-up inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)
